Subject: Invitation to TI-USA Quarterly Meeting
Message:
Dear TI-USA Corporate Supporters:

We are delighted to invite you to the next TI-USA Quarterly Meeting on
Friday, June 29, 2001 from 12:00 - 3:00 p.m. at the offices of Weil, Gotshal
& Manges, 767 Fifth Avenue, New York.  We will meet in conference room 25A
and lunch will be served.

We hope that you will be able to participate in this informative meeting.
Please reply to this email to indicate whether or not you can attend.
